rule CDB_Dark_Web_Intercept_Telegram_RaaS_Syndica {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Dark Web Intercept: Telegram_RaaS_Syndicate - Potential Threat Activity"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-12"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-SWARM-AI" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 50 threat advisories. Of these, 10 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 7 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, UNC-CDB-SWARM-AI, CDB-APT-28. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.

key_recommendations.impact: Reduces attack surface by eliminating highest-risk exposure vectors

key_recommendations.recommendation: Deploy auto-generated Sigma/YARA detection rules to SIEM/EDR
key_recommendations.impact: Provides layered detection coverage for identified TTPs

key_recommendations.recommendation: Conduct threat hunting exercises based on generated hunt hypotheses
key_recommendations.impact: Proactive identification of undetected compromise indicators
